insight: For pre-product timing-bet startups at hackathons, visual demos (dashboard + live data) beat SDK demos and config demos. VCs fund what they can see. The demo IS the product at pre-seed stage.

Physical AI infrastructure startups should pitch as data flywheels not protocol bridges. Bessemer 2026 Atlas report tracks this category. OPC-UA failure modes (BadTimeout, reconnect memory trap) signal domain expertise to industrial VCs.
